title: PM Lane 174 - Local Review Checklist Grouping
authority: repo technical authority; PM lane implementation authority; final integration authority
objective: Reduce Project Miner Temp Power local checklist scan burden by grouping the existing seven Local Review Checklist items without changing checkbox behavior, candidate-scoped browser storage, export inclusion, clear behavior, or write boundaries.
scope: Grouped the existing seven Local Review Checklist items into Source Review Evidence, Approval Readiness Evidence, and Write Boundary Confirmation.
Preserved the same checkbox labels, detail text, candidate-scoped browser storage key, checkbox update handler, clear button behavior, PM brief/export inclusion, and no-write language.
Kept the local review checklist disclosure behavior stateless with no local-review-checklist disclosure localStorage key.
Used a read-only sidecar to verify the grouping shape and smoke hardening while VS Code Codex retained PM implementation and final integration authority.
guardrails: No Supabase, Render, Vercel, or Olares product action.
No approval POST or approval-row creation.

No field authorization, assignment, schedule/status, durable field record, production tracking, customer report, completion evidence, billing, payroll, invoice, accounting, or external finance-system write.
No new export action, export handler, filename, payload version, localStorage key, backend route, service/auth/ingress change, or autonomous AI business-state mutation.
validation: rg -n "PM Lane 174|Review checklist groups|Source Review Evidence checklist group|Approval Readiness Evidence checklist group|Write Boundary Confirmation checklist group|mutationRequests\)\.toHaveLength\(0\)" PROJECT_STATUS.md docs/operations ops/agents apps/operations-web
validation_result: PASS - operations-web typecheck passed; operations-web build passed; focused Playwright pm import-intake smoke passed; packet JSON parsed; PM Lane 174 guardrail rg passed; git diff --check passed with only expected CRLF warnings on touched and unrelated markdown files.
sidecar_result: Read-only sidecar Russell confirmed the grouping is UI-only, state still uses the same candidate-scoped key and handlers, exports remain driven from REVIEW_CHECKLIST_ITEMS, and the smoke should assert all seven checkbox names plus group counts to catch itemId typos.
